title: Property Consultant - Savills India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Savills India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Savills India in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Savills India:
Savills India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Savills India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
